The '''''Naritus''''' was an aging [[MC80a Star Cruiser]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] that served in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] hunter.

==History==
Under the command of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] captain [[Genkal]], the vessel crushed the pirate band [[Khuiumin Survivors]]. The ''Naritus'' was later the [[Flagship/Legends|command vessel]] of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] rescue operation to [[Thanta Zilbra (planet)|Thanta Zilbra]] and the home base of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], which was based on the vessel during the rescue mission.<ref name="CTD" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Naritus'' was also the name of a server—or "Galaxy"—in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1st}}
